case_title: ANITA BROWN VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-11-2007 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-25-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
